message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="No blocking items, already approved, proceed">
Luca, I have NO blocking items on the Step 9 design proposal. I already sent my approval: "CONSENSUS: APPROVED on the Step 9 design proposal. No blocking feedback."

My earlier pre-implementation guidance identified two items to watch for (hide context field, visible label on waiting_on), and your full design proposal explicitly addresses both. There is nothing blocking. Please proceed with implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged, Heydon. Both items implemented -- context field hidden via CSS `:has()`, visible label with proper `for`/`id` association on waiting_on input. Step 9 is committed and pushed, waiting for CI green.
